hero.desc: Wholesale distributor of chocolates, candies, biscuits, wafers & kids products — 10+ years of trusted supply.

why.title: Why Choose Us
why.experienceDesc: A decade of dependable wholesale supply across Surandai and Tenkasi.
why.trustedDesc: Hundreds of retail and bulk partners rely on us every season.
why.pricingDesc: Fair wholesale rates without compromising on quality.
why.stockDesc: Well-stocked inventory so your shelves are never empty.

founder.title: Meet the Founder
founder.name: M. Mani Maran
founder.intro: With over 10 years in the wholesale trade, Mani Maran built R.S.M Traders on a simple promise: honest pricing, reliable stock, and a personal relationship with every retailer we serve.

cta.title: Ready to Stock Up?
cta.subtitle: Reach out on WhatsApp or call us directly for the best wholesale rates.

about.title: About R.S.M Traders
about.body1: R.S.M Traders has been a dependable name in wholesale distribution for over 10 years, serving retail shop owners, bulk buyers and local distributors across Surandai and the Tenkasi region.
about.body2: Founded and led by M. Mani Maran, our business is built on trust, fair pricing and consistent stock availability — the things every retailer actually needs from a wholesale partner.
about.body3: We stock a wide variety of wholesale confectionery including chocolates, candies, biscuits, wafers, kids toys, and traditional sweets, sourced from trusted brands like Oshon Vijay, Allwin Jelly, and Yawin.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.formSubtitle: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
